working_on: Land routine-mode session pattern foundation per approved plan: ADR 0051, target file schema + ops doc, check_routine_scope.py and check_target.py with tests, session-build-lifecycle routine-mode branch, validate.py + pre-commit hook scope/integrity checks, CLAUDE.md third session mode, adoption check. Supersedes the Paperclip trial-install premise (rejected — forces API billing per Anthropic April-2026 policy). The Phase 5 epistemology build-readiness gate, twice-displaced, is reframed by the new architecture: it folds into the Phase 5 master plan session (now S-0045) which authors engine/build_readiness/phase_5.md as part of producing the auto_target.json contract.
declared_scope: Routine-mode session pattern foundation per approved plan at /Users/shanekidd/.claude/plans/1-prior-session-token-joyful-dijkstra.md. Land: (1) ADR 0051 (engine; routine-mode and engine loop, with Paperclip rejection in Alternatives Considered) plus matching MemPalace decision drawer per the two-layer recording rule; (2) engine/operations/routine-mode-operations.md as the Layer 1 ops doc covering target file schema, master plan session procedure, routine boot procedure, criterion type catalog, troubleshooting; (3) engine/session/auto_target.schema.md schema doc with full example; (4) engine/tools/check_target.py predicate runner with 5 criterion types (migration_applied, validate_passes, adr_status, file_exists, predicate registry) plus tests; (5) engine/tools/check_routine_scope.py for plan-vs-scope and staged-vs-scope checks plus tests; (6) modify engine/operations/session-build-lifecycle.md to add the routine-mode boot branch; (7) extend engine/tools/validate.py with the routine-mode soft-warns (no-target-reference and >3-issues spam); (8) wire engine/tools/hooks/pre-commit with scope-check on staged files plus master-plan-integrity check (auto_target.json keys other than tasks[*].status / tasks[*].blocked_reason hard-fail in routine mode); (9) update CLAUDE.md to add the third session mode (routine) alongside exploration/build with explicit posture for scope_lock invariance, operational allowlist, gh issue create authorization, HANDOFF additions, and master-plan-revision-via-HANDOFF rule; (10) update engine/STATE.md (Paperclip integration entry → superseded by ADR 0051) and engine/operations/README.md (pointer to new ops doc); (11) run adoption check end-to-end with the 9-scenario synthetic target to verify atomic checkout, target-met-no-claim, scope-check rejection, operational-write acceptance, discovered-issue path, issue-spam soft-warn, and pause behavior. Out of scope: Phase 5 master plan itself (S-0045), flipping routine from Manual to Hourly (user action post-S-0045), Anthropic count_tokens API integration (rejected by user — API fees). phase: NA-engine-apparatus.
